<!-- Thanks for contributing to xcloud-mcp. Please fill in the sections below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the checks you ran, for example `npm test`, `npm run typecheck`. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are focused and atomic, with clear messages.
- [ ] Every commit is signed (SSH/GPG verified).
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` pass locally.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials are included in the code or the diff.
